title: hypericum spicatum
intro: Hypericum spicatum, also known as shrubby St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Hypericum genus. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Hypericum spicatum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
